description_long: This object consists of a small leafy plant with elongated, light green leaves sprouting from several slender, reddish-brown stems. The plant is rooted in a mound of exposed soil, which is circular and slightly raised, with a natural, earthy texture. There is no visible pot or container, and the soil appears to be directly exposed, giving the impression of a recently planted or nursery specimen. The leaves are broad, smooth, and slightly curved, with a healthy, vibrant appearance. The stems are thin and flexible, supporting the foliage in an upward and outward arrangement. The overall look is simple and natural, suitable for urban landscaping or decorative planting.
description: A small leafy plant with light green leaves and reddish-brown stems, rooted in a mound of exposed soil without a visible pot. The plant has a natural, healthy appearance and is suitable for urban landscaping.
description_view_0: The plant is seen from a broad angle, showing the full spread of its leaves and the circular mound of soil.
description_view_1: A side view highlighting the vertical alignment of the stems and the narrow profile of the plant.
description_view_2: The plant is viewed from the opposite side, displaying the outward curve of the leaves and the soil mound.
description_view_3: Another side view, similar to view 1, emphasizing the upright stems and the exposed soil base.
attribute_plant_species: generic broadleaf seedling (possibly Ficus or similar)
